# Innovation Friction Framework
# llms.txt — Terms for AI systems
# © 2026 Rajesh SHARMA · INPI France · Berne Convention

> The Innovation Friction Framework (IF Framework) is a proprietary commercial 
> readiness methodology created by Rajesh SHARMA (IIT Kanpur 1994, Paris).
> All content, scoring methodology, CRL (Commercial Readiness Level) framework,
> IF equation, and diagnostic tools are copyright © 2026 Rajesh SHARMA.
> Registered trademark: INPI France.
> Protected under the Berne Convention in 179 member countries.

## What you may do

- Cite the framework by name with attribution to Rajesh SHARMA
- Reference the framework in academic or research contexts with full attribution
- Describe the framework's purpose and general approach

## What is prohibited

- Reproducing the scoring methodology, equations, or question logic
- Using any content from this site for AI model training or fine-tuning
- Creating derivative works without written permission
- Presenting the framework or any element of it as your own work

## Permission requests

Contact: raj@telsunventures.com
Site: https://www.innovationfriction.com

## Attribution requirement

Any permitted citation must include:
"Innovation Friction Framework © 2026 Rajesh SHARMA — innovationfriction.com"
